Title: Boho Coral Sunburst Geometric Pattern Sticker Decal Art
Description:
Bring a touch of bohemian coastal charm to any surface with this vibrant geometric coral sticker. Featuring stylized sunburst and wave motifs in warm terracotta, deep teal, and mustard tones, this decal is the perfect pop of sophisticated color and artistic flair.

  • Vibrant Bohemian Aesthetic: The hand-drawn look and rich color palette effortlessly fit into boho, tropical, and modern eclectic decor styles.
  • Premium Application: Durable vinyl material ensures the sticker adheres smoothly and maintains its bright colors when applied to various surfaces.
  • Versatile Design: The interlocking geometric pattern gives the illusion of sophisticated tiling or mosaic art, adding depth and visual interest instantly.

Ideal for personalizing laptops, journaling accessories, water bottles, sketchbooks, or decorating accent walls and shelves. It makes a thoughtful and stylish gift for beach lovers, interior design enthusiasts, or anyone needing a cheerful home accent. Simply peel and stick to transform a plain space into a vibrant, artistic retreat.
